name: Unbachelored
overview: Viraj and Arjun have been best friends since childhood. While Viraj loves his bachelor life and wants Arjun to move in as his flatmate, Arjun has other plans of ‘settling down’. What happens when this bachelor reveals he wants to be ‘unbachelored?’

trailers.title: Dice Media | Unbachelored ft. Viraj Ghelani | Official Trailer | New Web Series Releasing on Jan 7th
